guidelines: Limit top-level navigation items to 5-7 items
Clearly indicate the current active section
Provide consistent navigation placement across all pages
Consider mobile navigation patterns (hamburger, bottom nav)
colorGuidance: Active link with brand accent color or underline
Navigation background: solid white, transparent, or dark depending on style
Hover states with subtle background change
typographyGuidance: Active link: same size, brand color or bold
commonMistakes: Too many items causing cognitive overload
Dropdown menus that close too quickly on hover
qualityChecklist: Current page is clearly indicated in navigation
Mobile menu opens and closes smoothly
